title: armeria eriophylla
intro: Armeria eriophylla, also known as the desert owl's clover or white owl's clover, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the primrose family (Primulaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, which help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Armeria eriophylla include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
